_comment: Cathedral .mcp.json project-scope. Loaded by Claude Agent SDK cuando settingSources: ['project']. HTTP MCPs only para compatibilidad Vercel serverless runtime (stdio MCPs requieren child_process.spawn no soportado Vercel functions). Stdio MCPs reservados para ejecución local/Hetzner. Sesión 18/05/2026.

supabase._comment: Supabase MCP remoto HTTP/SSE. Auth Bearer service role key. read_only=false requerido para apply_migration (vs default true)
